name: Pearson plc
description: Pearson plc is a leading global education company headquartered in London, United Kingdom. The company provides a wide range of educational products, services, and digital learning tools for students, educators, and institutions worldwide. Pearson focuses on assessment, curriculum, and professional certification, aiming to help people make progress in their lives through learning. With a strong emphasis on digital transformation, the company serves millions of learners across various sectors, including higher education, English language learning, and workforce skills development, maintaining a significant presence in international markets through its diverse portfolio of educational resources and technology-driven solutions.
